name: Healthcare (Zimbabwe)
definition: Private and mission providers of health services and medicines retail/wholesale: clinics, surgeries, hospitals, laboratories, pharmacies and allied-health practices (public-sector facilities are directory context, not tenants of this pack).

subSectors.name: Private and mission hospitals
subSectors.description: Inpatient facilities outside the public system.

subSectors.name: Pharmacies and medicines wholesale
subSectors.description: Retail pharmacies and wholesale dealers in MCAZ-licensed premises.

subSectors.name: Allied health
subSectors.description: Physiotherapy, dental, optometry and similar practices.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Multi-branch pharmacy groups, clinics and laboratories.
Private hospital groups and integrated providers.

officialSizeThresholds.note: No official facility-size classification was verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. Professional and facility licensing regimes beyond MCAZ premises licensing are declared as research gaps rather than described.
